exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query: SELECT DISTINCT "Index" FROM index_trade ORDER BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Index" FROM index_trade ORDER BY "Index";

args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" = "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_days, COUNT(*) AS total_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA') AND "Date" BETWEEN '2018-01-01' AND '2018-12-31' GROUP BY "Index" ORDER BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_days, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" = "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS flat_days, COUNT(*) AS total_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA') AND "Date" BETWEEN '2018-01-01' AND '2018-12-31' GROUP BY "Index" ORDER BY "Index";

result.preview: "Indices with more up days than down days in 2018: GSPTSE \u2014 44 up, 41 down; IXIC \u2014 44 up, 31 down. (NYA had more down days: 36 up, 42 down.)"

args.answer: Indices with more up days than down days in 2018: GSPTSE — 44 up, 41 down; IXIC — 44 up, 31 down. (NYA had more down days: 36 up, 42 down.)

val_args.answer: Indices with more up days than down days in 2018: GSPTSE — 44 up, 41 down; IXIC — 44 up, 31 down. (NYA had more down days: 36 up, 42 down.)
